questionHtml: Sketch the curve y = f ( x ) , 0 ≤ x ≤ 5 indicating clearly the coordinates of the maximum and minimum points and any intercepts with the coordinate axes.
markschemeHtml:
A1A1A1

A1 for correct shape over approximately the correct domain
A1 for maximum and minimum (coordinates or horizontal lines from 3.5 and 1 are required),
A1 for y -intercept at 3

[3 marks]
